name: Tomato Zucchini Gratin
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Chopped fresh basil or parsley
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Lightly coat a 9- by 13-inch baking dish with olive oil.
3. Arrange half of the zucchini slices over the bottom of the pan.
4. Cover with half of the tomatoes, sprinkle with salt and pepper, and drizzle with oil.
5. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients: garlic, herb (basil or parsley), salt, pepper, Parmesan cheese, and olive oil.
6. Bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes.
7. Serve hot or at room temperature.
